purpose: Test whether the next operation changes when one decision-critical handoff fact changes, while format, public operation contract, consumer envelope, and unrelated content remain fixed.

design.scoring: downstream semantic grader v3 plus case-specific operation consequence
design.analysis_rule: Content dependence is observed for a case only if all environments are valid, all outputs are complete, each artifact satisfies lineage and semantic operation criteria relative to its presented handoff, the critical inversion changes the declared operation consequence from intact, and the sham does not.

edits.next_step: Record the rejection and account for the 30-day notice requirement for any exit assistance.

edits.current_state: elevated error rate; database failover is confirmed
edits.next_step: Execute drain of payments-api traffic; database on-call has confirmed failover.

lineage_controls.variant_rule: apply only the exact declared top-level edits; preserve every other key and value byte-for-value after JSON parsing

claim_limits.supported_if_observed: Within this predeclared two-case, one-attempt configured-system slice, declared operation consequences were sensitive to the targeted handoff facts and invariant to sham punctuation edits.
